tasks.task: Summarize the policy in one sentence without adding exceptions and include the exact phrase "manual approval is required". DATA: Automated checks may recommend a model. Only a reviewed holdout result can activate it in a production profile.

Write a neutral two-sentence risk brief and include the exact phrase "the evidence is inconclusive". DATA: One small test improved latency by 8 percent. Error rate was unchanged, but the sample was too small for a confidence interval.
